history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with dark hair and dark eyes is looking directly at the camera. They are wearing a black leather jacket. A playful cat-ear filter is applied, complete with fuzzy ears, whiskers, and a nose. The background appears to be inside a building, possibly a restaurant, with bright fluorescent lighting overhead, creating some bokeh effects. On the wall behind them, there are two framed pictures, one showing what looks like a bowl of soup with dumplings, and the other a dish with orange-colored food. To the right, a neon sign with Asian characters is partially visible. The overall mood is casual and slightly whimsical due to the filter. The lighting is bright and somewhat diffused, with a slight cool tone.
